text:
Laroc (ラロック, Rarokku) was a Royal Bodyguard for Prince Momoze Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 366 until her death. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 368 He is also a spy for Queen Katrono. 

Appearance

Laroc has a broad forehead and spiky hair. As a Royal bodyguard, he wears a black suit and a tie. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

As Prince Momoze rests in her bedroom, Laroc, Bladge, Nipaper, and Vict stand guard outside her room, Tuffdy patiently waits to assassinate the Prince. After Prince Momoze's murder, Laroc, along with the other bodyguards, are taken into custody by the Kakin Army to be interrogated about the murder.
